slides.title: Splitting Code 🔪
slides.content:
As your code grows, putting everything in one file gets messy.

ES6 **Modules** let you split code into multiple files.

slides.title: Exporting 📤
slides.content: To share a function from a file, use `export`.

slides.title: Importing 📥
slides.content: To use it in another file, use `import`.

slides.title: Default Export 🌟
slides.content: You can export one main thing using `export default`. When importing, you don't need curly braces `{}`.

quizData.question: Which keyword shares a function?
quizData.explanation: `export` makes it available to other modules.
